name: Arcoma AB
summary: Arcoma AB develops, produces, and provides radiology solutions worldwide. It offers digital x-ray and radiography systems for radiographic applications, as well as for use in general, eneral, muscle/skeleton, thoratic, pediatric, and trauma/resus clinics. The company sells its products through OEM partners. Arcoma AB was founded in 1990 and is based in V√É¬§xj√É¬∂, Sweden.
